overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a foggy, neon-lit urban street under an elevated highway. The player moves from a covered concrete walkway past holographic displays into an open plaza with outdoor cafés and vendor stalls, featuring heavy atmospheric haze and cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated concrete highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered pathway beneath the overpass, passing teal neon light poles

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support pillars creating a tunnel-like effect
tall vertical light fixtures emitting bright cyan-teal illumination along the walkway
white painted metal fence running parallel to the walkway on the left side
faint glowing holographic display visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night under a massive concrete highway overpass. Teal neon light poles line the left side of the walkway, casting reflections on the wet pavement. The space is enclosed and sheltered, with limited visibility due to atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional plaza with holographic tourist information display

events.description: passing the large green holographic tourist information cube on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking past the holographic display and transitioning from the covered walkway into the open plaza area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking with umbrella through the fog

entered.detail: large glowing green holographic cube displaying tourist information and maps
large red patio umbrella marking outdoor seating area ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the enclosed overpass to a more open plaza. A large green holographic tourist information cube dominates the right side, glowing brightly through the fog. The concrete overpass structure recedes to the left as red umbrellas become visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with vendor stalls and scattered outdoor seating

events.description: entering the open plaza area with vendor stalls and red umbrellas

agents.ego_description: navigating through the plaza past vendor stalls and pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind stall with white boxes and containers
pedestrian carrying a glowing orange umbrella walking in the rain

entered.detail: street vendor setup with white plastic containers and boxes under a small shelter
tall tree with thick trunk visible in the center of the plaza ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an open plaza filled with atmospheric fog. Vendor stalls with white containers line the right side while pedestrians with glowing umbrellas walk through the scene. The overpass structure is now visible on the right, and a large tree marks the transition to the next area.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor cyberpunk café with neon accent lighting and canopy

events.description: entering the covered outdoor café area with pink neon table lights

agents.ego_description: walking through the outdoor café past seated patrons and high tables with neon lighting

notable_agents.action: patron sitting on stool at high table under the canopy
person standing near the bar counter in the background

entered.detail: black canopy structure with white neon edge lighting providing partial cover
high tables with glowing pink and magenta neon center lights

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a stylish outdoor café with black canopies and distinctive pink neon table lights. Patrons sit at high stools under the shelter while the camera moves through the seating area. The atmosphere remains foggy and atmospheric, with the large tree now prominent in the center of the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, industrial underpass into a vibrant, neon-lit open plaza. It begins beneath a massive concrete highway overpass where teal neon poles cast reflections on wet pavement amidst a dense atmospheric haze. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed structure recedes to the left and the space opens into a plaza dominated by a glowing green holographic tourist cube and distant red umbrellas. The scene then expands past white vendor stalls and pedestrians with glowing umbrellas before passing a large central tree that marks the entrance to a social hub. Finally, the camera glides into a stylish outdoor café, moving through a seating area defined by black canopies and distinctive pink neon table lights.
